showReleaseNotes.title: Release notes popup
showReleaseNotes.desc: PlayerTube will make a new tab with the release notes page once the extension has been updated

lang.title: Change menus language
lang.desc: This will only change the language within this popup as of currently. If you'd like to add your own language, please read up on the "Making a Language" part of the README on the GitHub page!

year.title: Change year of player
year.desc: Setting this will change the player UI to match the selected year

alternateMode.title: Toggle alternate mode
alternateMode.desc: Some themes may have alternate themes, this one does! Alternate Mode will be disabled when custom themes are enabled.

toggleRoundedCorners.title: Toggle rounded corners
toggleRoundedCorners.desc: Turns on or off the rounded corners around video

autoplayButton.title: Show the autoplay button
autoplayButton.desc: The autoplay button is located on the right side of controls. Allows users toggle whether another video should play automatically

heatMapToggle.title: Toggle the "Heat Map"
heatMapToggle.desc: YouTube's Heat Map is displayed on top of the progress bar, showing where other viewers went to or replayed in the video

toggleScrubberThumbs.title: Toggle video preview when srubbing
toggleScrubberThumbs.desc: When moving the srubber in the progress bar, a preview of the video where you're at will show above the progress bar

toggleSpinner.title: Show custom loading spinner
toggleSpinner.desc: Turns on or off the loading spinner loaded in by PlayerTube

fullyExtendBar.title: Fully extend the progress bar's height at all times
fullyExtendBar.desc: When enabled, the progress bar will be at hover height no matter if you're hovering over the progress bar or not

fakeBarToggle.title: Toggle fake bar
fakeBarToggle.desc: When enabled, PlayerTube will make a fake progress bar at the bottom of a video to show where you're at without showing the controls

toggleMoreVids.title: Show the "More Videos" area in fullscreen
toggleMoreVids.desc: When enabled, using the mouse scroll-wheel will scroll up related videos & the player controls with it. This feature was introduced on & off since 2023, but later fully introduced with the Delhi player UI

embedOtherVideos.title: Toggle the "Show Other Videos" box in embeds
embedOtherVideos.desc: This option is different than the option above. When paused in a embedded video, a box with related videos will display

toggleLessSettings._self.title: Minify settings menu
toggleLessSettings._self.desc: When enabled, options below this will appear with what to disable in the player settings menu. Reopening this popup is required after enabling this

toggleFSButtons.title: Toggle fullscreen buttons
toggleFSButtons.desc: These buttons are shown at the bottom right above the player controls. This feature was introduced with the Delhi player UI

toggleFadeOut.title: Fade out YouTube player controls
toggleFadeOut.desc: By default, PlayerTube moves the player controls down instead of fading them out

toggleWatermark.title: Toggle a YouTube channel's watermark
toggleWatermark.desc: Channel watermarks are displayed at the bottom right of a video

togglePaidContent.title: Toggle the "Paid Products" or Sponsorship popups
togglePaidContent.desc: If a video has sponsorships or paid products within the video details, popups at the top right (& left if in embeds) will often appear

toggleAlterInfo.title: Toggle the "Altered or Synthetic Content" popups
toggleAlterInfo.desc: If a video has set "Altered content" to "Yes" via YouTube Studio, a popup will appear at the top left saying the video includes said content

toggleInfoCards.title: Toggle the info cards tab
toggleInfoCards.desc: When disabled, the button for a video's info cards will be removed

endScreenToggle.title: Toggle end screen cards
endScreenToggle.desc: Disables all end screen cards (channels, videos, playlists, etc.)

customTheme.title: Custom Theming
customTheme.desc: You'll need to reopen the settings popup after enabling this

settingsBgColor.title: Color of the player's settings background

progressBarBgColor.title: Background color of the progress bar

volumeSliderBack.title: Color of the volume slider
volumeSliderBack.desc: If you want to use the exact same color as the progress bar for the volume slider, you don't need to change this value.

scrubberIconHover.title: Change the image of the scrubber when hovering
scrubberIconHover.desc: If you want to use the same image for the value above, you don't need to change this value.

scrubberSize.title: Change the image size of the scrubber
scrubberSize.desc: It is recommended to change this if you change the Scrubber icon; start low (something like 12) then go up

scrubberHeight.title: Change the height of the scrubber
scrubberHeight.desc: If you want to use the same width value on here, don't change this value.

scrubberWidth.title: Change the width of the scrubber
scrubberWidth.desc: If you want to use the same height value on here, don't change this value.

scrubberTop.title: Move the scrubber down
scrubberTop.desc: Make value negative to move up

scrubberLeft.title: Move the scrubber right
scrubberLeft.desc: Make value negative to move left

scrubberPosition.title: If needed, change the scrubber image position
scrubberPosition.desc: Example: 10px (for x) 5px (for y). Note this does not change where the Scrubber will be moved to, you still have to play off of all the other sizing settings above.

nuke_all: THE BIG NUKE BUTTON. (aka reset all settings) NO TURNING BACK WHEN THIS IS PRESSED.
